hooks.command: f=$(sed -n 's/.*"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p' | tr '\' '/' | tr -s '/'); case "$f" in */scripts/*.py|*/features/builder.py) o=$(venv/Scripts/python.exe .claude/skills/run-mlb-model-v2/smoke.py 2>&1); c=$?; if [ "$c" -ne 0 ]; then printf 'Smoke test FAILED after editing %s (exit %s):\n' "$f" "$c"; printf '%s\n' "$o" | tail -25; exit 2; fi;; esac; exit 0
hooks.rewakeSummary: Smoke test failed after your edit
